sections.text: The following data is from the Placement statistics table: Zoho recruited 450 students with a package of 6 LPA. TCS recruited 340 students with a package of 4.5 LPA. Wipro recruited 280 students with a package of 4 LPA. HCL recruited 220 students with a package of 3.6 LPA. Infosys recruited 180 students with a package of 5 LPA.
The following data is from the Key funding agencies supported table: TNSCST, MSME, IEI (I), DST, AICTE, UGC, ISRO, DRDO, CSIR, and DBT are key funding agencies supported.

The purpose of the MSAJCE Research and Development Cell is discussed, as well as the funding agencies that MSAJCE R&D Cell works with. Support for research among students and faculty at MSAJCE is mentioned and whether MSAJCE helps students apply for research funding is addressed. The types of research activities that MSAJCE promotes and how MSAJCE promotes Institute-Industry Collaboration through R&D are also covered. Whether students at MSAJCE can apply for government research funding is clarified and the role of the R&D Cell at MSAJCE is explained.

Lists all members of the MSAJCE Research Advisory Committee with their designations, contact numbers, and email addresses. The MSAJCE Research Advisory Committee includes Dr. B. Janarthanan, Head-Research, MSAJCE, Chennai as Convener. Dr. Srinivasan, Secretary TNSCST, Chennai, with Phone: 044-22301428 and Email: ms.tanscst@nic.in, serves as Advisor. Dr. Parthiban, Asso. Prof / Prod. NIT, Trichy, with Phone: 9443430246 and Email: parthiban@nitt.edu, is an Advisor. Dr. Somashekhar S Hiremath, Associate Professor, MSB 310, Manufacturing Engineering Section, Dept of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Madras, Chennai, also serves as Advisor, with his profile available at https://iitm.irins.org/profile/61849#personal_information_panel. Dr. Sabitha Ramakrishnan, Professor, Dept of Instrumentation MIT, Chennai, with Phone: 9789977989 and Email: sabitha.ramakrishnan@gmail.com, is an Advisor. All Ph.D qualified faculty are Members. An alternate listing includes Dr. B. Sheela Rani, Dean Research, Sathyabama University, Chennai, with Phone: 9840941389 and Email: directorresearch@sathyabama.ac.in as Advisor, replacing Dr. Somashekhar S Hiremath in that version.

This chunk answers who is the convener of the MSJCE Research Advisory Committee, who are the advisors in the MSJCE Research Advisory Committee, and what is Dr. B. Janarthanan's role at MSJCE. It also answers how to contact the Research Advisory Committee at MSJCE, who from IIT Madras is an advisor to MSJCE research, who is Dr. Sabitha Ramakrishnan and what is her role at MSJCE, what is the Research Advisory Committee structure at MSJCE, and what are the contact details for TNSCST related to MSJCE research.
